Enable AI-powered discovery of Microsoft 365 releases using Microsoft Release Communications MCP server.

Microsoft 365 Roadmap

Explore the newest Microsoft 365 capabilities — from core apps to Copilot and agents.
 Jump to roadmap


The Microsoft 365 roadmap provides estimated release dates and descriptions for commercial features. All information is subject to change. As a feature or product becomes generally available, or is cancelled or postponed, information will be removed from this website. If Targeted release is available the Rollout start date will reflect the change beginning to appear in Targeted release followed by Standard release, otherwise the Rollout start date will reflect the change beginning to appear in Standard release.

GPT-5.2 now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Microsoft expands model choice through Anthropic partnership and data processing agreement
October 2025

Microsoft 365 Copilot now includes App Builder, making it easy to create and deploy apps

Generally available June 1

Introducing Microsoft 365 Business with Copilot: The new standard for small business

Microsoft 365 Business with Copilot introduces an integrated solution designed specifically for small businesses, combining productivity apps, security, and AI in one offering. You get built-in Copilot capabilities across your tools—helping you automate tasks, create content, and manage operations more efficiently without needing additional setup or expertise.
Learn more Get started
May 28

Introducing a new design for Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details
Available in Copilot Cowork. Rolling out to Copilot Chat, Excel, PowerPoint, Copilot Studio.

Available today: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Microsoft 365 Copilot expands model choice to Claude Opus 4.8 model designed for complex, multi step and long running work. You get stronger instruction following, smarter tool selection, and more reliable follow through—helping you complete advanced tasks like document creation, data analysis, and presentations with greater accuracy and consistency. Claude Opus 4.8 is available today in the model selector for eligible users in Copilot Cowork (Early access via Frontier program) and rolling out to Microsoft 365 Copilot licensed users in Copilot Chat, Excel, PowerPoint, and Copilot Studio in Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Learn more Try now
Generally available June 1
May 28

Introducing Microsoft 365 Business with Copilot: The new standard for small business

See details
Early access via the Frontier program

Microsoft 365 Copilot now includes App Builder, making it easy to create and deploy apps

App Builder captures your intent and Copilot creates an app you can preview, refine, and share. It accelerates app creation so teams can build solutions quickly—without deep technical skills.
Learn more Try now
Early access via the Frontier program

Introducing Agent Mode across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint

Agent Mode in Excel, Word, and PowerPoint delivers best-in-class, AI-generated spreadsheets, documents and presentations right in the apps millions of people rely on every day at work.
Learn more Try now
Early access via the Frontier program
October 2025

Copilot now includes App Builder, making it easy to create and deploy apps

See details

Microsoft 365 Copilot with Work IQ: AI built for work

Work IQ is the intelligence layer behind Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents that helps Copilot understand you, your job, and your company.
Learn more
Early access via the Frontier program
November 2025

Introducing Agent Mode across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint

See details
Early access via the Frontier program

Introducing Microsoft Agent 365: The control plane for agents

Agent 365 gives you one control center to deploy, organize, and govern every agent—no matter how they were built. You get clear visibility, stronger security, and easier management so teams can use agents with confidence.
Learn more Get started
November 2025

Microsoft 365 Copilot with Work IQ: AI built for work

See details
Generally available

Microsoft expands model choice through Anthropic partnership and data processing agreement

Copilot will continue to be powered by OpenAI’s latest models, and now our customers will have the flexibility to use Anthropic models too—starting in Researcher or when building agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio.
Learn more Try now
Early access via the Frontier program
November 2025

Introducing Microsoft Agent 365: The control plane for agents

See details
Generally available

GPT-5.2 now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Accessible in the model selector, GPT‑5.2 gives agents stronger reasoning and more reliable multi‑step execution so they can handle complex workflows with fewer clarifications and higher accuracy.
Learn more Try now
Generally available
December 2025

Microsoft expands model choice through Anthropic partnership and data processing agreement

See details

Introducing the First Frontier Worker Suite Built on Intelligence + Trust

Announcing Microsoft 365 E7 (ME7) Frontier Worker suite which unifies Microsoft 365 E5, Microsoft 365 Copilot, and Agent 365 (which will be generally available on May 1st) into a single solution powered by Work IQ and integrated with the apps and security stack you already rely on.
Learn more Try now
Generally available
December 2025

GPT-5.2 now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details

Powering Frontier Transformation with Copilot and agents

Introducing Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot. Agentic capabilities are embedded directly into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Copilot Chat, bringing multi‑model intelligence—and new experiences like Cowork, which enables long‑running, multi‑step work powered by Anthropic’s Claude—into everyday workflows.
Learn more Try now
March 9

Introducing the First Frontier Worker Suite Built on Intelligence + Trust

See details
Early access via the Frontier program

Introducing multi-model intelligence in Researcher

Researcher brings leading AI models together with two new capabilities to help you make decisions with confidence. Critique helps you refine responses from GPT with Claude, while Council enables you to compare GPT and Claude responses side by side.
Learn more Try now
March 9

Powering Frontier Transformation with Copilot and agents

See details
Early access via the Frontier program

Copilot Cowork: Now Available in Frontier

Turn to-dos into done with Copilot Cowork. Describe the outcome you want, and Cowork plans the steps and takes action across your files and conversations—bringing long-running, multi-step work into Microsoft 365 Copilot while you stay in control.
Learn more Try now
Early access via the Frontier program
March 30

Introducing multi-model intelligence in Researcher

See details

Latest enhancements for Copilot security, management, and analytics

Microsoft 365 Copilot introduces new security, management, and analytics enhancements to help organizations deploy Copilot with greater confidence and control. New capabilities in Microsoft Purview safeguard sensitive data in Copilot prompts and web searches, enable bulk remediation of overshared content, and expand Copilot Dashboard analytics to give IT and security teams clearer visibility into Copilot usage, risk, and business impact.
Learn more Get started
Early access via the Frontier program
March 30

Copilot Cowork: Now Available in Frontier

See details
Early access via the Frontier program

Copilot in Word: New Capabilities for Document Workflows

Copilot in Word improves document editing and review by making changes, comments, and structure easy to manage directly in Word, helping teams work faster without losing accuracy or control.
Learn more Try now
April 7

Latest enhancements for Copilot security, management, and analytics

See details
Generally Available

Bring your everyday business apps into the flow of work with agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Microsoft 365 Copilot introduces agents that bring everyday business apps directly into the flow of work, turning intent into action without leaving Copilot chat. New agent experiences connect Copilot with apps like Dynamics 365, Adobe Express, and other partner tools, enabling you to view data, take action, and complete tasks inline—reducing context switching and accelerating real work execution.
Learn more Try now
Early access via the Frontier program
April 8

Copilot in Word: New Capabilities for Document Workflows

See details

Copilot Notebooks gets smarter for Microsoft 365 Copilot users

Copilot Notebooks for Microsoft 365 users adds richer work data sources, multimodal mobile capture, and new output types like Excel workbooks and infographics to the notebook experience. This helps you bring more complete project context into one place and turn that content into deliverables faster.
Learn more Try now
Generally Available
May 7

GPT-5.5 Instant in Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details

Introducing a new design for Microsoft 365 Copilot

Microsoft 365 Copilot introduces a redesigned experience to make it more performant and adaptive to your needs. This includes a simplified Copilot app with faster load and response times and adaptive design that reveals the right capabilities at the right moment – and a more contextual and connected Copilot experience in the Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook apps.
Learn more Try now
May 26

Copilot Notebooks gets smarter for Microsoft 365 Copilot users

See details
Agent in Private Preview. Desktop app in Frontier program.

Introducing Microsoft Scout

Microsoft Scout introduces a personal agent that proactively takes action across your work—so you don’t have to manage every task manually. You get an always on agent that understands your priorities, works across Microsoft 365 apps, and continues progressing work over time. This service also includes a companion desktop app, which enables AI to take action on your local files and across the web, helping you stay ahead and move tasks to completion with less effort.
Learn more Get started with the Microsoft Scout app
Available in Copilot Cowork
May 28

Available today: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details
Generally available June 16

Announcing the new Work IQ APIs

Work IQ is an intelligence layer that provides a semantic understanding of everything happening in your business. By continuously processing content and signals from email, calendar, meetings, chats, files, people, collaboration patterns, and connected line of business systems, Work IQ provides intelligence that isn’t available in any other way. The Work IQ APIs provide programmatic access to this unique intelligence layer and give agents everything they need to work effectively in your organization.
Learn more Get started
Agent in Public Preview. App in Frontier Program
June 2

Introducing Microsoft Scout

See details
Early access via Frontier program

Word: Legal Agent in Frontier

Copilot in Word introduces a Legal Agent designed for contract review, redlining, and negotiation using structured legal workflows. Legal teams gain negotiation ready edits, clear citations, and full control through tracked changes—helping maintain consistency, reduce risk, and move faster without leaving Word.
Learn more Try now
Public Preview
April 30

Work IQ API public preview brings Copilot intelligence into agent-to-agent communication

See details
Public Preview

Work IQ API public preview brings Copilot intelligence into agent-to-agent communication

The Work IQ API is available in public preview, giving developers access to the intelligence layer behind Microsoft 365 Copilot through agent‑to‑agent (A2A), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and REST interfaces. Developers can build agents and apps grounded in real work context—without raw data plumbing—while inheriting enterprise security, compliance, and governance by default.
Learn more Try now
Early access via Frontier program
April 27

Copilot in Outlook: New agentic experiences for email and calendar

See details
Early access via Frontier program

Copilot in Outlook: New agentic experiences for email and calendar

Copilot in Outlook introduces new agentic experiences for email and calendar, enabling AI to take action across scheduling, follow‑ups, and inbox management. You save time and stay focused as Copilot helps manage communication, prioritize tasks, and move work forward with less manual effort.
Learn more Try now
Generally Available
April 27

Real-time voice agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio transform customer experience

See details
Generally available

Real-time voice agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio transform customer experience

Microsoft Copilot Studio now supports real-time voice agents in Dynamics 365 Contact Center, enabling organizations to build premium, speech-to speech voice agents that listen, reason, and respond naturally in live conversations. Combined with Microsoft’s recent agentic customer experience developments, this capability helps you automate service interactions, scale personalized engagement, and turn every customer touchpoint into a driver of growth.
Explore new real-time voice agents Explore new agentic customer experience
Generally Available
April 27

Available today: GPT-5.5 Thinking and ChatGPT Images 2.0 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details
Generally Available

Available today: GPT-5.5 Thinking and ChatGPT Images 2.0 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Microsoft 365 Copilot now includes GPT‑5.5 thinking and ChatGPT Images 2.0, expanding how you reason through complex tasks and create high‑quality visuals directly in your flow of work. Helping you move faster from idea to execution faster with fewer iterations to get to the right outcome.
Learn more Try now
Public Preview
April 24

Dynamics 365 now delivers new agentic capabilities across manufacturing

See details
Public Preview

Dynamics 365 now delivers new agentic capabilities across manufacturing

Dynamics 365 introduces new agentic capabilities across manufacturing, embedding Copilot and purpose built agents across planning, production, fulfillment, and Field Service. These new capabilities, including the new Procurement Agent, help manufacturers sense demand and supply risk earlier, replan operations in near real time, and execute service and production decisions directly in the flow of work to protect customer commitments across the manufacturing value chain.
Learn more Try now
Generally Available
April 22

Copilot’s agentic capabilities in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are generally available

See details
Generally Available

Copilot’s agentic capabilities in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are generally available

Agentic capabilities in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are now generally available, enabling Copilot to plan, execute, and refine multi step work directly within your everyday productivity apps. You can now create documents, analyze data, and build presentations end-to-end as Copilot moves beyond assistance to complete complex tasks in the flow of your work.
Learn more Try now
Available in Copilot Cowork, Copilot Studio, and rolling out to Copilot in Excel
April 16

Available today: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details
Available in Copilot Cowork, Copilot Studio, and rolling out to Copilot in Excel

Available today: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

Continued innovation in model choice built for work brings Claude Opus 4.7 to Microsoft 365 Copilot. Opus 4.7 helps you complete complex, multi-step work more accurately with stronger instruction following, improved tool selection, and higher resolution visual understanding.
Learn more Try now
Generally Available
April 13

Bring your everyday business apps into the flow of work with agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details

2026 Work Trend Index Annual Report

AI is changing the shape of work—and the winners will be the companies that redesign how work is organized, delegated, and governed. Explore the key 2026 Work Trend Index insights and the Microsoft 365 Copilot innovations that bring the Frontier Firm to life.
Learn more Read the report
Early access via Frontier program
May 5

Copilot Cowork: From conversation to action across skills, integrations, and devices

See details
Generally Available

GPT-5.5 Instant in Microsoft 365 Copilot

GPT 5.5 Instant is now available in Microsoft 365 Copilot, delivering low latency responses optimized for common work questions, image-based inputs, and STEM tasks. You can ask everyday questions, upload and interact with images, and solve technical problems in real time—enabling faster decisions and uninterrupted workflows.
Learn more Try now
May 5

2026 Work Trend Index Annual Report

See details
Early access via Frontier program

Copilot Cowork: From conversation to action across skills, integrations, and devices

Copilot Cowork expands with new capabilities across skills, integrations, and devices, building on last month’s introduction of AI-driven task execution in Microsoft 365. You can reuse workflows with skills, connect work across Microsoft and third-party systems through integrations, and delegate tasks from anywhere with new mobile support—making it easier to turn intent into action end to end.
Learn more Try now
Early access via Frontier program
May 5

Federated Copilot connectors: Bringing real-time enterprise data within Microsoft 365 Copilot

See details
Early access via Frontier program

Federated Copilot connectors: Bringing real-time enterprise data within Microsoft 365 Copilot

Federated Copilot connectors bring real-time enterprise data from third-party systems directly into Microsoft 365 Copilot using secure, live queries. Organizations gain up-to-date insights without moving or duplicating data, enabling more accurate responses and seamless workflows across connected tools.
Learn more Try now
Generally Available
May 1

Microsoft 365 E7 and Agent 365 are now generally available

See details
Generally available

Microsoft 365 E7 and Agent 365 are now generally available

Microsoft 365 E7 and Agent 365 are now generally available, delivering a unified foundation for secure AI and agent governance at scale. Organizations gain simpler licensing, predictable costs, and built‑in controls to confidently deploy and manage AI agents across people, apps, and workflows.
Learn more Get started
Early access via Frontier program
April 30

Word: Legal Agent in Frontier

See details

Now available

These features are now generally available.
  • Copilot in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook introduces a redesigned experience that adapts to what you’re working on and surfaces relevant actions directly in context. The Dynamic Action Button provides a consistent entry point to Copilot across the apps that sits above your work and understands the context beneath it, helping you make edits and take action without leaving your content.
     
    Learn more Try now
  • Microsoft Agent 365 is the control plane for agents that gives IT one place to observe, govern, and secure every agent across the organization. You can stay in control as agents become part of everyday work.
     
    Learn more Try now
  • Copilot works directly inside your apps to help you create, edit, and refine content from start to finish. It can make changes to your document, spreadsheet, presentation, or email while you work and guide the output in real time—without leaving the app.
     
    Learn more Try now

Coming soon

These features are currently in development.
  • Show employees they're using an approved AI tool by adding your organization's logo to the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Copilot app. It's a simple way to build trust and signal that Copilot is managed by your organization. Set it up in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
     
    Learn more View in roadmap
  • Work IQ API gives developers access to the intelligence layer behind Microsoft 365 Copilot through agent‑to‑agent (A2A), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and REST interfaces. Developers can build agents and apps grounded in real work context—without raw data plumbing—while inheriting enterprise security, compliance, and governance by default.
     
    Learn more In public preview
  • Your Viva Engage communities will now be available in Teams alongside teams, chats and channels. You can connect, share knowledge, and learn from others across the company, all without leaving Teams.
     
    Learn more View in roadmap

Frontier Program

Frontier is Microsoft’s early access program for experimental AI features. Try new features early, give real-time feedback, and influence what ships to all users.
Learn more
Microsoft Scout app
Microsoft 365 Copilot app: Simplified design and improved performance
Copilot Notebooks: Smarter experience for Microsoft 365 Copilot users
Copilot in Word: Legal Agent

Microsoft Scout app

Microsoft Scout introduces a companion desktop app to your personal agent, which enables AI to take action on your local files and across the web, helping you stay ahead and move tasks to completion with less effort.
Get started

Microsoft 365 Copilot app: Simplified design and improved performance

The Microsoft 365 Copilot app has a cleaner interface, faster app load and chat response times, and adaptive design that reveals the right capabilities at the right moment. These updates simplify the chat experience, improve navigation, and introduce new ways for you to organize work—helping you stay focused, maintain context, and move work forward more efficiently.
Get started

Copilot Notebooks: Smarter experience for Microsoft 365 Copilot users

Copilot Notebooks for Microsoft 365 users adds richer work data sources, multimodal mobile capture, and new output types like Excel workbooks and infographics to the notebook experience. This helps you bring more complete project context into one place and turn that content into deliverables faster.
Get started

Copilot in Word: Legal Agent

Copilot in Word introduces a Legal Agent designed for contract review, redlining, and negotiation using structured legal workflows. Legal teams gain negotiation ready edits, clear citations, and full control through tracked changes—helping maintain consistency, reduce risk, and move faster without leaving Word.
Get started
